PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Apr-10-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (in person):
Daniel Murphy, Esq., for Patricia McLaughlin, Petitioner.

At the court's query, counsel offers advocacy for his client's petition. There is discussion regarding the presumption of revocation of will. There is discussion and confirmation regarding a bond amount. After additional discussion, the court confirms that there are no appearances to object to the instant petition. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration With Will Annexed. The Lost Will dated Aug-24-1990 is admitted to probate. Patricia McLaughlin is appointed Administrator of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $1,056,000. Karen Ann Simons was appointed probate referee on Feb-01-2023 and the appointment remains as effective. The court revokes the Letters of Administration issued on Jun-20-2023. New Letters of Administration with Will Annexed must be issued. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Jun-18-2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Wong. Not Reported.

Appearances: Daniel Murphy appeared in person for Patricia Mclaughlin (petitioner).
Matthew Hilzendrager (realtor) appeared in person for Karim Fanadka (buyer).
